productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Kanon White Blue Kidswear
description: Compositiontop: White and blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with light blue back panel, light blue panel strips on the front sleeve and doodle graphic on the front shorts: Plaid shorts in brown, grey and light blue stripes made of cotton fabric, with elasticated waist, two insert pockets on the sides and two concealed pockets on the backFittingTop: Regular98 cm (24-30 months)Shorts: Regular 98 cm (24-30 months)Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Bring out the happy sailor side in your little boy in this white and blue tee and plaid shorts combo from gini and jony. The doodle of the puppy in the paper boat and the sailor inspired words on the chest, all add to the care-free sea loving spirit of this tee. Team this with the super comfy plaid shorts and crocs footwear for happy, casual outings with your little one, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
